title: www.drybulkETF.com - September 14, 2021
summary: Capesize rates whipsaw on tight supply and weather disruptions while China restricts steel output - Blink and you Vale reduces capacity guidance, now sees smaller increase next year - One of the largest iron ore miners globally, Volatility in dry bulk freight to remain elevated - For the rest of 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk

children.title: Overview
children.summary:
- Capesize rates whipsaw on tight supply and weather disruptions while China restricts steel output - Blink and you
- Vale reduces capacity guidance, now sees smaller increase next year - One of the largest iron ore miners globally,
- Volatility in dry bulk freight to remain elevated - For the rest of 2021, we expect demand growth for dry bulk
